hooks.command: node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse(d); const f=j.tool_input.file_path||'dosya'; const name=f.split('/').pop(); require('child_process').execSync('git add -A && git commit -m "auto: '+name+'"', {stdio:'inherit'}); }catch(e){} });"
